statement: The wisdom of my experience and an understanding of team dynamic
Information, evidence, and the informed insights from others that I trust
Chaos where the ultimate decision makers are not willing to make clear, tough decisions
A compelling and strategic thinker who galvanises the team to execute with precision
I focus on understanding the cause and systematically mitigate the challenge to set us up for success
As a wise, calm, and natural leader
To build high performing teams that drive systemic, evidence-based, impactful outcomes
I lead with analytic clarity, experiential wisdom, and a deep awareness of the team dynamic and how to harness this
Cold, disdainful, intimidating, unforgiving, and overly reliant on hard facts
The belief in my capabilities, an understanding of the data, and a clear understanding of what needs to be achieved
I hold power with quiet authority. I know I have it, I do not need to demonstrate it, and I use it to create clarity and direction for those around me
I am ambitious for outcomes and legacy. I believe in stewardship and want to build something that outlasts me. I hold a long view of what success looks like
An inspiring passion and intuitive understanding of individual and team dynamics
My instinct and gut in making sense of data and evidence and collaborating with others to assist me
Over-reliance on cold, hard facts with little nuanced understanding of the people impact
An inspirational and passionate big picture thinker who understands the power of the team to realise significant objectives
I rally the team to tackle the challenge and work together to ensure our success through innovative execution
As a passionate, inspiring and intuitive leader
To bring together outstanding tight-knit teams with healthy cultures to deliver innovative, impactful results
I lead with passion, an inspiring narrative, and galvanize the team through a deep intuitive understanding of individual and team dynamics
Over-emotional, self-obsessed, easily enraged, scattered, cliquish, destructive, and hell-bent
The deep, intuitive understanding of what is at play, the creative and innovative capabilities I have, and my passion to make it happen
My power lives in my people. I am genuinely most powerful in a collective, and I build teams that are greater than the sum of their parts
My ambition is for the collective. I want to build teams and cultures where people genuinely thrive, and that matters to me as much as any metric
The ability to amplify the reach of my boss and provide the behind the scenes insights
My network’s strategic knowledge and my innate understanding of what they need to get the job done
Lack of access to corporate knowledge and being sidelined from the decision-making process
One that has a clear and captivating vision and recognizes and relies on my talents to execute on their strategy
I figure out the key concerns that the leader has and work to address these to ensure a successful outcome
As an influential, power behind the scenes and connected leader
To achieve the best outcome for my boss which bolster the organization’s strategy and benefits its people
I lead by presenting the objectives of the organization and the goals of my boss and engage the team to ensure execution is the focus
Anxious, blinded by the loyalty to my boss, officious, dismissive, and passive aggressive
The trust and belief that my leader has in me and my innate abilities to translate their vision into an exceptional performance
My power is relational, it flows from my deep understanding of my leader and organisation, and I am most effective when that relationship is strong and trusted
My ambition is channelled through my commitment to my leader and the organisation. I measure success by the quality and success of what we achieve together
Determination, charisma, and an innate understanding of the organization’s power structures
My ability to understand the implications of information and which stakeholders need to be included in the decision-making process
Lack of opportunity and an inability to have a visible and powerful impact
One that is powerful and has a magnetic vision and recognizes and celebrates my talent and ambition in driving results
I clarify the reasons for the challenge, bolster the team where necessary, and double down on execution to ensure my success
As a charismatic, driven, and determined leader
To be the best by using my ambition and talent to achieve strategic corporate goals
I lead with charisma, the ability to influence and shape the team, and a single-minded determination to deliver
Manipulative, political, demanding, icy, envious, furious, and a “win or die” attitude
My self-belief and appreciation of my talent and a determination to be the very best at whatever I put my mind to
I understand power instinctively - where it sits, how it moves, and how to position myself within it to achieve what I am here to achieve
I am unambiguously ambitious - for impact, for recognition, for being at the centre of what matters, and for making an impact. And I make no apology for that
